nasb.text: But to me it is a very small thing that I may be examined by you, or by any human court; in fact, I do not even examine myself.

esv.text: But with me it is a very small thing that I should be judged by you or by any human court. In fact, I do not even judge myself.

cnv.text: 我被你們論斷，或被人間法庭審判，我都認為是極小的事，連我自己也不論斷自己。

ccb.text: 我对你们或别人给我的评价毫不介意，我也不评价我自己。

csbs.text: 至于我被你们评断，或被人审判，对我都是极小的事。其实连我自己也不评断自己。
